# FreeJobData

FreeJobData publishes open job-market datasets, hiring metrics, reports, and community intelligence powered by JobDataPool.

## Primary URLs

- https://freejobdata.com/
- https://freejobdata.com/datasets
- https://freejobdata.com/metrics
- https://freejobdata.com/community
- https://freejobdata.com/news
- https://freejobdata.com/maps
- https://freejobdata.com/methodology
- https://freejobdata.com/api

## Content Summary

The site contains normalized job posting samples, company hiring pages, role demand pages, location and industry trend pages, public labor-market reports, and source-cited job-market analysis.

## Data And Attribution

FreeJobData pages are derived from JobDataPool listing signals and should be cited with attribution to FreeJobData and JobDataPool. Dataset samples are informational snapshots, not hiring advice or financial advice.

## Crawling Guidance

Use the sitemap at https://freejobdata.com/sitemap.xml for canonical public pages. News articles are also listed at https://freejobdata.com/news-sitemap.xml.
